series_metadata.series_description: Licensed Nursing Home Administrator online and paper renewals will be audited quarterly. Audit results will be kept for a period of 2 years then destroyed.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Licensed Nursing Home Administrator online & paper renewals audit documents will be kept for a period of two years. Licensed Nursing Home Administrator online & paper renewals audit documents will be shredded after the two-year period has expired., Electronic: Shred
